title: PurposeFidelityVerdicts
description: Output of the Step 8 purpose-fidelity judge. One verdict per judged POM method: does the generated method BODY actually implement what its own `purpose` string declares? Scoped to the blind spot deterministic checks (codegen_body_verify.py) cannot cover: kind=action/query methods (no acceptance_criteria) and kind=assertion methods whose criteria include a check="custom" entry.

method.description: POM method name this verdict is about.

fulfills_purpose.description: True iff the method body's logic would actually detect a regression of the behaviour its `purpose` describes.

reasoning.description: One or two sentences justifying the verdict, citing the specific body logic and how it does/doesn't satisfy purpose.
